author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Result: hierarchical-llm-rust compiles and tests pass (3/3) against local ferrotorch v0.2.0. Changes: (1) Both Cargo.toml files rewritten to use path deps. (2) ferroviz dep removed (vizgraph command gated out — requires external crate not in this checkout). (3) Missing PretokenizedDataset implemented inline in finetune.rs. (4) Removed dead 'mod data' import. All pre-existing upstream warnings preserved (gradcheck unused vars, mask loop style). The Vizgraph CLI command is commented out, all other 8 commands compile.
